compliance.assurance_rationale: NERC CIP-005-7 R1 Electronic security perimeter — continuous network segmentation monitoring is the direct evidence of ESP enforcement for BES Cyber Systems.
IEC 62443 FR 6.2 Continuous monitoring — segmentation monitoring implements the continuous-monitoring Foundational Requirement for IACS zones/conduits.
TSA SD02C III.A Cybersecurity plan — network segmentation between IT/OT is an explicit pipeline-cybersecurity-plan requirement.
API RP 1164 3rd edition 6.2.1 Logging and monitoring — segmentation-boundary monitoring is a listed logging/monitoring control in the pipeline recommended practice.
